name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Aurora, CO's US Cash Advance location on E Quincy Ave offers quick payday and title loans with extended hours for fast cash needs.
description_long:
Located at 16909 E Quincy Ave a in Aurora, CO, this US Cash Advance storefront provides accessible emergency funding during extended hours. The location is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 9 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 10 AM to 7 PM, making it convenient for Aurora residents to visit after work or on weekends.

This Aurora location offers payday loans and title loans designed to bridge short-term financial gaps. For details on loan amounts, terms, and immediate availability, call +1 720-513-4870 to speak with the lending team.

Aurora residents facing urgent cash needs can often complete applications the same day at this E Quincy Ave location. Bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of current income, and an active checking account to streamline the process.
address: 16909 E Quincy Ave a, Aurora, CO 80015

company_info.headquarters: 16909 E Quincy Ave a, Aurora, CO 80015

pros: Same-day or next-day funding reported by customers (cash within hours)
Fast in-person approval process documented at under 45 minutes
Staff transparency regarding fees and repayment terms emphasized in reviews
No collateral or credit check required for loans
Extended operating hours including weekends (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends)
Flexible loan amounts ($100-$50,000 depending on product type)
Multiple contact channels (phone, email, in-person location)
cons: No information provided about actual APR or interest rates on the website
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area with limited seating
No online pre-approval option despite customers requesting this feature
Loan products are unsecured short-term debt that can create debt cycles if misused
Uses third-party lenders rather than direct lending, adding complexity to terms
best_for: Workers needing emergency cash before next paycheck for urgent bills or medical expenses
Individuals with poor credit who cannot access traditional bank loans quickly
Borrowers in genuine short-term financial crises who can repay within weeks
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for working individuals with poor credit who face genuine emergencies and need cash within hours—not days. The primary caveat is that payday loans are expensive short-term debt, typically carrying APRs in the 400%+ range (not disclosed on this site), and should only be used when no alternatives exist, as they can trap borrowers in debt cycles if used repeatedly.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit location
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 16909 E Quincy Ave a, Aurora, CO. Same-day payday and title loans with extended hours.
